Package org.sosy_lab.java_smt.delegate.trace

Class TraceLogger

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.sosy_lab.java_smt.delegate.trace.TraceLogger
  • public class TraceLogger
extends Object

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Class Description
      static interface  TraceLogger.CheckedRunnable
      Just like Runnable, but allows checked exceptions.

    • Method Detail

      • toVariable

        public String toVariable​(Object f)
        Returns the variable name of a tracked object.

        Use mapVariable(String, Object) to bind an object to a variable

                      String pExpr)
               throws IOException
        Add a definition to the log.
